name: property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, unexpected equipment failures cause tenant complaints. We provide predictive maintenance monitoring instead of reactive maintenance scheduling.

features: basic alert system for equipment status
